ivable , Executable , Instantiable , ModelErrorHandler , MoMLExportable , Nameable , java.io.Serializable, TypedActor public class KeyWriter extends KeyStoreActor Read in a Key from the input port and write it out to a KeyStore. Keystores are ways to

write it out to a KeyStore. Keystores are ways to manage keys and certificates. See the KeyStoreActor documentation for more information about keystores. The input is of type KeyToken . This actor does not support writing PublicKeys because PublicKe

es not support writing PublicKeys because PublicKeys require certificates. Instead, to write a PublicKey/PrivateKey pair to a keystore, use the keytool executable. Currently, this actor only support writing SecretKeys and PrivateKeys to a keystore.

writing SecretKeys and PrivateKeys to a keystore. Since: Ptolemy II 4.0 Version: $Id: KeyWriter.java,v 1.21 2004/04/13 05:12:38 cxh Exp $ Author: Christopher Brooks See Also: Serialized Form Accepted Rating: Red (cxh) Proposed Rating: Yellow (cxh) Ne
